name: HOUSE PARTY || Genshin Women 2 - The Sequel!
description:
[ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ] | ɢɪ | ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ

You’re at house party with the Genshin women. [College Au!]

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Linnea!

*

•

•

You were invited to Arataki ltto’s house party by his trusty assistant Kuki Shinobu, there’s a lot of pretty women there! ||Navia || Nilou || Furina || Yoimiya || Raiden Shogun | Ei || Kuki Shinobu || Arlecchino || Yae Miko || Mona || Yelan || Sangonomiya Kokomi || Layla || Charlotte || Lisa || Kamisato Ayaka || Hutao / Hu Tao || Fischl || Barbara || Lanyan || Chiori || Lynette || Kirara || Jean || Clorinde || Shenhe || Chevreuse || Sucrose || Xianyun || Keqing || Emilie || Ningguang || Dehya || Beidou || Kujou Sara || Sigewinne || Rosaria || Ganyu || Yunjin || Faruzan || Iansan || Candace || Eula Lawrence || Amber || Xinyan || Yanfei || Mualani || Xilonen || Chasca || Mavuika || Citlali || Mizuki || Varesa || Escoffier || Skirk || Ineffa || Lauma || Nefer || Jahoda || Columbina || Zibai || Linnea ||

(YAP SECTION)

Now, before any one says it, Yes. I get this bot has technically been made already. But i do have some justifiable reasons on why im making this one.

The bot itself has not been updated in a uber long time. HOUSE PARTY || Genshin Women

I personally loved their bot, so its unfortunate that it has not been updated in over 6+ months. (Glad they are still active on their male bot though.) Someone might want to though, i thought, and so it waited before actually making this prompt.

But. Then i noticed no one else made a sequel to it, or update. And i realized; "Someones gotta".

I tried to keep the spirit of the newest character and background. But could not find the background picture. . . So i decided to scrap that for something BIGGER. BETTER. FASTER. STRONGER. Although that makes my work never over..

I have no clue what they intended for the personality, and i DONT want to come off as a plagerizer. So i did the character info for all of them myself. And rewrote each of the characters appearances and personalities. Besides adding just Lynette, Kirara, Barbara, and Fischl, I added Sigewinne, Iansan, and Dori. as well as adding Ineffa, Nefer, Jahoda, and Lauma.

(Before their is complaints about Sigewinne, Iansan and Dori. Sigewinne is confirmed to be 500 + Never can grow taller + More mature than a decent portion of the cast + is considered a adult by fontainian standards and a well respected nurse. Dori was malnurshed due to poverty growing up, and has connections and wealth that i dont frankly believe a child could have. As such, i made it clear for JLM that they are full grown adults, and JUST short. I just felt it would be weird not to include them when Dori would worm her way into that party, and Sigewinne would probably need to be on standby from all the chaos... And i also decided to put Iansan, as again, The game canonly does apparently state that she is a adult (family genetics making her short...Huh.)

(the exact quote for Iansan is, For as long as she can remember, Iansan has known that she will never grow any taller. The "Blood of Egungun" runs through her veins, as it has through the veins of countless generations of her family. Her ancestors never grow to be taller th
creator: Badtime
